items.name: KIDS MENU
items.description: One deep-fried vegan dumpling, one crispy-fried kim mari (glass noodles wrapped in seaweed roll), finely sliced marinated beef, roasted seaweed with rice, and an apple-spritz.

items.name: KIDS MENU VEGAN
items.description: One deep-fried vegan dumpling, one crispy-fried kim mari (glass noodles wrapped in seaweed roll), tofu slices in a delicious soy-sesame marinade, roasted seaweed with rice, and an apple-spritz.
